zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Croft於1393年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾萊奧明斯特時，他的父親Sir John Croft39歲，母親Janet Verch Owain Glendower19歲。他於1418年與Margaret Walwyn在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1428年登記服兵役。他於1425年在英國賀福爾被列為he held the office of sheriff of herefordshire in 1425.。他去世於1433年在英國英格蘭賀福爾卡芙特享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾亞爾波爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Croft于1393年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾萊奧明斯特时，他的父亲Sir John Croft39岁，母亲Janet Verch Owain Glendower19岁。他于1418年与Margaret Walwyn在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1428年登记服兵役。他于1425年在英国賀福爾被列为he held the office of sheriff of herefordshire in 1425.。他去世于1433年在英国英格兰賀福爾卡芙特享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾亞爾波爾。

nameMeanings.name: Croft
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places, for example in Lincolnshire, Lancashire, Herefordshire, and North Yorkshire, all named with Old English croft ‘small arable enclosure (normally adjoining a house)’, or a topographic name for someone who lived by a croft, from Middle English croft.
English: possibly in some cases a variant of   Craft   2.
Americanized form of German, Danish, Swedish, or Jewish   Kraft  . Compare   Kroft   and   Craft  .

variants.name: Craft
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English craft ‘skillful, clever, learned’.
English: habitational name from Croft in Leicestershire. See also   Croft  .
Americanized form of German, Danish, Swedish, or Jewish   Kraft  . See also   Croft  .

variants.name: Crate
meanings: English (Hampshire and Surrey): from Middle English crate ‘hurdle, basket’, or occasionally perhaps from crete ‘cradle’, probably applied as a metonymic occupational name for a maker of such articles. Alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Croft 1.

variants.name: Crofts
meanings: English: variant of Croft , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Groft
meanings: English: perhaps an altered form of   Croft  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Croft was born in 1393, in Leominster, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Croft, was 39 and his mother, Janet Verch Owain Glendower, was 19. He married Margaret Walwyn in 1418, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1428. In 1425, at the age of 32, his occupation is listed as he held the office of sheriff of herefordshire in 1425. in Herefordshire, England. He died in 1433, in Croft, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Yarpole, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Croft est né en 1393, à Leominster, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Croft, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Janet Verch Owain Glendower, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Walwyn en 1418, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1428. En 1425, à l’âge de 32 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est he held the office of sheriff of herefordshire in 1425. à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1433, à Croft, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Yarpole, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Croft 1393 in Leominster, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Croft 39 und seine Mutter Janet Verch Owain Glendower 19. Er hat 1418 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Walwyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1428 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1425, als er 32 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als he held the office of sheriff of herefordshire in 1425. in Herefordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1433 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Croft, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Yarpole, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Croft è nato il nel 1393 nel Leominster, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Croft, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Janet Verch Owain Glendower, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Walwyn nel 1418, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1428. Nel 1425, all'età di 32 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come he held the office of sheriff of herefordshire in 1425. nel Herefordshire, England. Morì nel 1433, nel Croft, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Yarpole, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Croftが1393年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアレオミンスターで生まれた時，父Sir John Croftは39歳，母Janet Verch Owain Glendowerは19歳であった。1418年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでMargaret Walwynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1428年に兵役登録をした。1425年，32歳の時，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでの職業はhe held the office of sheriff of herefordshire in 1425.と記録されている。彼は1433年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクロフトで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアヤープオルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Croft(이)가 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 리민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Croft(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Verch Owain Glendower(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1418년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Margaret Walwyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1428년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1425년, 32세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 허퍼드실르에서 he held the office of sheriff of herefordshire in 1425.이었다. 그는 1433년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 크로프트에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 야르포일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Croft nasceu em 1393, em Leominster, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Croft, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Janet Verch Owain Glendower, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Walwyn em 1418, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1428. Em 1425, com 32 anos, sua profissão aparece como he held the office of sheriff of herefordshire in 1425. em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1433, em Croft, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Yarpole, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Croft родился в 1393 г. в местности леоминстир, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Croft было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Verch Owain Glendower, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Walwyn в 1418 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1428 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1425 году, в возрасте 32 лет, работал по профессии he held the office of sheriff of herefordshire in 1425. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. Он умер в 1433 г. в местности крофт, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности ярпол, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Croft nació en 1393, en Leominster, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Croft, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Janet Verch Owain Glendower, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Margaret Walwyn en 1418, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1428. En 1425, a la edad de 32 años, su ocupación registrada era he held the office of sheriff of herefordshire in 1425. en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1433, en Croft, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Yarpole, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
